protocol: Derm Foundation embedding experiment: extract 6144-dimensional google/derm-foundation embeddings, train a class-balanced linear probe, select C on nested grouped calibration data, and report the held-out grouped SCIN fold once.
selection_protocol: Nested C selection; evaluation fold is not used for hyperparameter selection.
sanity_check: A compact logistic-probe sweep with and without class weighting, selecting C by either macro recall or accuracy-first calibration, also failed to recover the deployed grouped baseline. Best sanity-check setting reached about 69.4% accuracy and 29.7% macro recall.
interpretation: Derm Foundation embeddings did not improve this mapped face-focused SCIN task under the grouped/nested protocol. The linear probe retained dermatitis signal but collapsed several tail labels, including 0.0 mean recall for hyperpigmentation_like_uneven_tone.
